final_prompt.prompt:
Create an educational knowledge card for children explaining the story of 三国赤壁之战.

Style/medium: needs a "儿童卡通画" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 上海美术电影制片厂 classic animation heritage, 1980s Japanese children's book illustration (e.g., 安野光雅), contemporary Chinese picture-book editorial style; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be single large knowledge card layout with clear title area, bullet-point sidebar for key facts, and main story illustration zone
Subject: must include the story of 三国赤壁之战 with clear narrative progression
Scene/backdrop: must include cartoon-style story illustration depicting the battle scene
Lighting/mood: needs an engaging, child-friendly atmosphere — exact tone is yours
Color palette: needs bright, child-appealing colors — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a friendly, approachable illustration texture — exact execution is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "三国赤壁之战" (clear title), key points listed with punctuation in sidebar
Constraints: must be single card format, suitable for children, clear title placement, sidebar with bullet points
Avoid:
